case_title: DJR ASSOCIATES LTD VS. ODE MAGAZINE INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED ON FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT TO PLAINTIFF DJR ASSOCIATES LTD
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-01-2012 CONTINUED TO JUL-18-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DJR ASSOCIATES LTD AS TO DEFENDANT KAMP, JURRIAAN DE PUY, HELENE ODE INTERNATIONAL PUBLISHERS LUXEMBOURG SNC ODE MAGAZIINE ODE MAGAZINE USA, INC. DOES 1 TO 5
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-04-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DJR ASSOCIATES LTD AS TO DEFENDANT ODE MAGAZINE INC. KAMP, JURRIAAN DE PUY, HELENE ODE INTERNATIONAL PUBLISHERS LUXEMBOURG SNC DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-01-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-02-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-17-2012

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-04-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AS TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE JUL-18-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-04-2012 IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. DISMISSAL ON FILE.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
